CreateRecord.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters.
CreateRecord.rr: Host record, e.g. "www". The combined length of the record value and zone name must not exceed 255 characters.
CreateRecord.value: Record value. Examples — IP: "192.168.1.1", CNAME: "cname.baidu.com", MX: "mail.baidu.com", SRV: priority weight port target (space-separated), e.g. "0 6 8080 vipserver.test.com".
CreateRecord.ttl: TTL of the DNS record in local DNS server cache (seconds). Default: 300s (Basic), 120s (Standard), 1s (Enterprise). Must be a positive integer.
CreateRecord.line: Resolution line or line group name. Default is "default". Basic and Standard editions support: default, ct (China Telecom), cmnet (China Mobile), cnc (China Unicom), edu (Education Network), search (Baidu Search Engine). For Enterprise edition line values, see [LineName](DNS/API参考/附录.md#LineName); line group names are also accepted.
CreateRecord.priority: Priority of the MX record. Valid range: [0, 50]. Required when the record type is MX.
